name: openstack
explanation: The legacy OpenStack check authenticates against Keystone Identity API v3 to obtain a scoped/unscoped token, then walks Nova / Neutron service catalogs. The required user field is a structured object {password, name, domain.id} that must match an OpenStack identity, and keystone_server_url points at a tenant-specific Keystone endpoint that varies per deployment. Neither the URL nor the credentials can be discovered from the wire — they are tenant configuration. No unauthenticated mode exists.
notes: Pattern D (spec-required credentials) plus tenant-scoped URL. Note that there is also an openstack_controller integration that handles the modern OpenStack deployment; same credential model.
